Characters and Inventions Revisited

Load video

Imperator: Rome - Characters & Inventions (inventions section starts at **4:36**).

[![Image 2](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/6/6d/Technology_screen.png/700px-Technology_screen.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/File:Technology_screen.png)

The main technology interface

[![Image 3: Menu technology.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/6/6f/Menu_technology.png/28px-Menu_technology.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Technology "Technology")[Technology](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Technology) represents the discovery, improvement, and implementation of new tools, techniques, and customs that give a wide variety of powerful bonuses across every field. Technologically advanced [nations](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/State "State") will field a more effective military, make more efficient use of their pops and resources, and be able to create a more stable and loyal realm, while those that fall behind will find it increasingly difficult to keep up with their peers. All technologies fall into one of four fields - [![Image 4: Martial.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/9/98/Military_power.png/28px-Military_power.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Martial_inventions "Martial inventions") martial, [![Image 5: Finesse.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/5/57/Civic_power.png/28px-Civic_power.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Civic_inventions "Civic inventions") civic, [![Image 6: Charisma.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/8/8d/Oratory_power.png/28px-Oratory_power.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Oratory_inventions "Oratory inventions") oratory and [![Image 7: Zeal.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/e/ea/Religious_power.png/28px-Religious_power.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Religious_inventions "Religious inventions") religious - and can be divided between generic **advances** that gain progress from generation of [![Image 8: Research points.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/c/cb/Research_points.png/28px-Research_points.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Technology "Technology")**research points** by [![Image 9: Pop noble.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/c/c8/Pop_noble.png/28px-Pop_noble.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Noble "Noble") nobles and [![Image 10: Citizens](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/0/06/Pop_citizen.png/28px-Pop_citizen.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Population#Citizens "Citizens") citizens, and the more specific [![Image 11: Invention.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/1/13/Invention.png/28px-Invention.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Inventions "Inventions")**inventions** that can be adopted by spending the [![Image 12: Invention.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/1/13/Invention.png/28px-Invention.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Innovation "Innovation") innovations that advances grant. The main technology interface can be accessed though the [![Image 13: Menu technology.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/6/6f/Menu_technology.png/28px-Menu_technology.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Technology "Technology")**technology** tab in the side menu bar.

## Advances[[edit](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/index.php?title=Technology&veaction=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Advances") | [edit source](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/index.php?title=Technology&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Advances")]

**Advances** represent the general level of knowledge and technology that the country has reached. They provide a baseline level of modifiers from increased technology and each advance grants [![Image 14: Invention.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/1/13/Invention.png/28px-Invention.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Innovation "Innovation") 1 innovation that can be used to unlock an [invention](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Inventions "Inventions"). There is no cap in the maximum level of advances that can be achieved, though ahead-of-time penalties will effectively give a soft cap to the level of advances that is realistically possible to achieve. Advances are slowly researched over time based on the amount of [![Image 15: Research points.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/c/cb/Research_points.png/28px-Research_points.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Technology "Technology") research points that a country produces in proportion to its [![Image 16: Integrated.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/1/14/Integrated.png/28px-Integrated.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Culture#Integrated_cultures "Culture") integrated culture population, subject to many different modifiers that can further increase or decrease the speed at which research progress is accumulated.

### Starting advances level[[edit](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/index.php?title=Technology&veaction=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Starting advances level") | [edit source](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/index.php?title=Technology&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Starting advances level")]

Each country starts with a predetermined level of technological advances, usually determined by their culture and civilization level, along with a number of unused [![Image 17: Invention.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/1/13/Invention.png/28px-Invention.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Innovation "Innovation") innovations corresponding to its starting advances level (if applicable).

The following countries/cultures start with all advances at level **2** (with [![Image 18: Invention.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/1/13/Invention.png/28px-Invention.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Innovation "Innovation")**8** starting innovations):

The following countries/cultures start with all advances at level **1** (with [![Image 19: Invention.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/1/13/Invention.png/28px-Invention.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Innovation "Innovation")**4** starting innovations):

All other countries start with no advances (level **0**) or innovations.

## Research[[edit](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/index.php?title=Technology&veaction=edit&section=3 "Edit section: Research") | [edit source](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/index.php?title=Technology&action=edit&section=3 "Edit section: Research")]

### Research points[[edit](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/index.php?title=Technology&veaction=edit&section=4 "Edit section: Research points") | [edit source](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/index.php?title=Technology&action=edit&section=4 "Edit section: Research points")]

[![Image 20: Research points.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/c/cb/Research_points.png/28px-Research_points.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Technology "Technology")**Research points** represent the contribution of pops towards the technological and intellectual advancement of the country, and are summed up over every pop in every owned territory every month to get the total research points for the state. Research points are generated exclusively by [![Image 21: Pop noble.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/c/c8/Pop_noble.png/28px-Pop_noble.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Noble "Noble") nobles and [![Image 22: Citizens](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/0/06/Pop_citizen.png/28px-Pop_citizen.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Population#Citizens "Citizens") citizens, who produce a base output of **0.5** and **0.2** research points, respectively, each month at [![Image 23: Happiness.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/a/a0/Pop_happy.png/28px-Pop_happy.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Happiness "Happiness") 100% happiness. Therefore, research point production is also affected by [![Image 24: Noble output](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/2/2e/Pop_noble_output.png/28px-Pop_noble_output.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Pop_output "Noble output") noble output and [![Image 25: Citizen output](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/5/5f/Pop_citizen_output.png/28px-Pop_citizen_output.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Pop_output "Citizen output") citizen output as well as [![Image 26: Research points.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/c/cb/Research_points.png/28px-Research_points.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Technology "Technology") research point modifiers, and is also heavily dependent on the [![Image 27: Noble ratio](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/9/9e/Pop_noble_ratio.png/28px-Pop_noble_ratio.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Pop_ratio "Noble ratio")[![Image 28: Citizen ratio](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/4/45/Pop_citizen_ratio.png/28px-Pop_citizen_ratio.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Pop_ratio "Citizen ratio") proportion and [![Image 29: Noble happiness](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/3/34/Pop_noble_happiness.png/28px-Pop_noble_happiness.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Happiness "Noble happiness")[![Image 30: Citizen happiness](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/4/4c/Pop_citizen_happiness.png/28px-Pop_citizen_happiness.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Happiness "Citizen happiness") happiness of nobles and citizens in the country. This means that in addition to directly maximizing research point production (such as by building [![Image 31: Library](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/5/55/Building_library.png/28px-Building_library.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Buildings#Library "Library") libraries and increasing overall [![Image 32: Population output](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/7/78/Local_population_output.png/28px-Local_population_output.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Output_modifier "Population output") population output with [![Image 33: Foundry](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/f/fa/Building_foundry.png/28px-Building_foundry.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Buildings#Foundry "Foundry") foundries and raising [![Image 34: Civilization.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/c/c6/Civilization.png/28px-Civilization.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Civilization_value "Civilization value") civilization level), increasing [![Image 35: Noble ratio](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/9/9e/Pop_noble_ratio.png/28px-Pop_noble_ratio.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Pop_ratio "Noble ratio") noble ratio and [![Image 36: Citizen ratio](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/4/45/Pop_citizen_ratio.png/28px-Pop_citizen_ratio.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Pop_ratio "Citizen ratio") citizen ratio directly through laws and [![Image 37: Academy](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/a/aa/Building_academy.png/28px-Building_academy.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Buildings#Academy "Academy") academies and [![Image 38: Court of Law](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/3/3b/Building_court.png/28px-Building_court.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Buildings#Court_of_Law "Court of Law") courts of law or indirectly by building more and larger [![Image 39: Territory city.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/b/b5/Territory_city.png/28px-Territory_city.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/City "City")[cities](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Cities "Cities") (as nobles and citizens do not exist in appreciable numbers in settlements) are also an effective longer-term solution towards increasing research point production. Large cities and [metropolises](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Metropolis "Metropolis") are usually the largest source of research points in the middle to late game, as the stacking effects of [![Image 40: Academy](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/a/aa/Building_academy.png/28px-Building_academy.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Buildings#Academy "Academy") academies and [![Image 41: Court of Law](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/3/3b/Building_court.png/28px-Building_court.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Buildings#Court_of_Law "Court of Law") courts of law as well as general [![Image 42: Civilization.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/c/c6/Civilization.png/28px-Civilization.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Civilization_value "Civilization value") civilization level increases from buildings means that they usually have both the highest proportion of nobles and citizens and the highest happiness and research point production per noble/citizen, though population capacity means that larger empires will still need a significant number of cities to produce enough research.

The following inventions give percentage increases to the amount of research points produced:

### Monthly research[[edit](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/index.php?title=Technology&veaction=edit&section=5 "Edit section: Monthly research") | [edit source](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/index.php?title=Technology&action=edit&section=5 "Edit section: Monthly research")]

**Monthly research** is the base value of research progress for all four fields and is obtained by dividing research efficiency by **192**, corresponding to a base time of 192 months (16 years) for each advance. The baseline research efficiency cap of 125% initially caps monthly research at **0.65%**, with the maximum possible research efficiency of 250% giving a highest possible base monthly research of **1.30%**.

### Research progress[[edit](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/index.php?title=Technology&veaction=edit&section=6 "Edit section: Research progress") | [edit source](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/index.php?title=Technology&action=edit&section=6 "Edit section: Research progress")]

**Research progress** is the actual monthly progress in each field of advances. The base value is the monthly research, which is then modified by the field-specific **research speed** modifier. The [![Image 43: Technology speed](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/e/ed/Technology_speed.png/28px-Technology_speed.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Technology "Technology speed")**technology speed** modifier affects the research speed in all fields, while the field-specific technology modifiers ([![Image 44: Military tech investment.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/b/b3/Military_tech_investment.png/28px-Military_tech_investment.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Technology#Research_Progress "Technology")**military tech investment**, [![Image 45: Civic tech investment.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/6/68/Civic_tech_investment.png/28px-Civic_tech_investment.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Technology#Research_Progress "Technology")**civic tech investment**, [![Image 46: Oratory tech investment.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/5/5c/Oratory_tech_investment.png/28px-Oratory_tech_investment.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Technology#Research_Progress "Technology")**oratory tech investment**, and [![Image 47: Religious tech investment.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/e/e3/Religious_tech_investment.png/28px-Religious_tech_investment.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Technology#Research_Progress "Technology")**religious tech investment**) are applied only to the research speed of one specific field. Modifiers to research speed can come from various [deity](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Pantheon "Pantheon") bonuses and omens, country [heritages](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Heritages "Heritages"), [trade goods](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Trade_goods "Trade goods"), and event/mission modifiers, but the main component of research speed for each field will typically be the attribute of the field's researcher corresponding to the field. The behind/ahead of time modifier is applied multiplicatively after all the other modifiers, and gives a **-0.75%** malus for each year ahead and **+0.75%** bonus for each year behind the country is compared to the benchmark of 1 advance every **16** years after the start of the game. Certain events can also directly increase the amount of research progress accumulated in a particular field.

An advance will be researched once the total research progress for that field reaches **100%**, with any overflow carried over for the next advance. The progress and effects (including unlocked inventions) of the next advance in each field can be viewed in the tooltip of the corresponding progress bar.

### Research efficiency[[edit](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/index.php?title=Technology&veaction=edit&section=7 "Edit section: Research efficiency") | [edit source](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/index.php?title=Technology&action=edit&section=7 "Edit section: Research efficiency")]

**Research efficiency** is the ratio of research points produced per year to [![Image 48: Integrated.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/1/14/Integrated.png/28px-Integrated.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Culture#Integrated_cultures "Culture") integrated culture population and the main component of the actual research progress each month, meaning that larger countries generally need higher research point generation in order to keep up with research. It is calculated according to the following formula:

![Image 49: {\displaystyle {\text{Research efficiency}}={\frac {{\text{Research Points}}\cdot 12}{\text{Integrated Culture Population}}}\cdot 100\%}](https://en.wikipedia.org/api/rest_v1/media/math/render/svg/2fecfacf5a2b7c96761cc8b4b0ec860ff50bc86b)
Generally, it is desirable to keep research efficiency at at least 80% in order to research advances at a reasonable pace. Research efficiency has a baseline cap of **125%**, modified by the [![Image 50: Research points.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/c/cb/Research_points.png/28px-Research_points.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Technology "Technology")**maximum research efficiency** modifier. Each of the following inventions gives [![Image 51: Research points.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/c/cb/Research_points.png/28px-Research_points.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Technology "Technology")**+25%** maximum research efficiency, giving a maximum of **250%** research efficiency if all of them are adopted:

Even though research efficiency is capped, it can still be useful to try to push the research points to population ratio higher in order to provide a buffer when assimilating pops or integrating new territory. Small, highly urbanized city-states will generally have a much higher research efficiency than sprawling empires with many rural pops, though it is possible to have a high research efficiency even with the largest empires so long as the major cities are sufficiently large and research-focused, of which growth through [enslavement](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Enslavement "Enslavement"), [migration](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Migration "Migration"), and continued [![Image 52: Territory city.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/b/b5/Territory_city.png/28px-Territory_city.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/City "City") urbanization will typically be needed to keep up.

As the denominator of research efficiency is based on the [![Image 53: Integrated.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/1/14/Integrated.png/28px-Integrated.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Culture#Integrated_cultures "Culture") integrated culture population, not the total population, it is also possible to get high research efficiency by keeping a relatively small core of integrated culture pops compared to the empire's total output - especially useful is conquering foreign areas with significant numbers of [![Image 54: Pop noble.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/c/c8/Pop_noble.png/28px-Pop_noble.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Noble "Noble") nobles and [![Image 55: Citizens](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/0/06/Pop_citizen.png/28px-Pop_citizen.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Population#Citizens "Citizens") citizens, as they will produce [![Image 56: Research points.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/c/cb/Research_points.png/28px-Research_points.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Technology "Technology") research points but not count against the denominator for research efficiency. However, the lower happiness of unintegrated culture pops, and particularly those of the higher classes that produce research, generally means that more care has to be taken to ensure their [![Image 57: Happiness.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/a/a0/Pop_happy.png/28px-Pop_happy.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Happiness "Happiness") happiness and keep [![Image 58: Unrest.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/e/e1/Unrest.png/28px-Unrest.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Rebellion#Unrest "Rebellion") unrest under control compared to integrating them.

### Researchers[[edit](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/index.php?title=Technology&veaction=edit&section=8 "Edit section: Researchers") | [edit source](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/index.php?title=Technology&action=edit&section=8 "Edit section: Researchers")]

Each technology field can have one **researcher** assigned to it, who leads the research efforts in that field and has a significant influence on how quickly advances in that field progress, giving a **+10%** research speed boost for each attribute point corresponding to the field ([![Image 59: Martial.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/9/98/Military_power.png/28px-Military_power.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Martial "Martial") martial for military advances, [![Image 60: Finesse.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/5/57/Civic_power.png/28px-Civic_power.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Finesse "Finesse") finesse for civic advances, [![Image 61: Charisma.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/8/8d/Oratory_power.png/28px-Oratory_power.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Charisma "Charisma") charisma for oratory advances, and [![Image 62: Zeal.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/e/ea/Religious_power.png/28px-Religious_power.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Zeal "Zeal") zeal for religious advances). Like all other jobs and offices, holding the researcher position counts towards [![Image 63: Prominence.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/c/cf/Prominence.png/28px-Prominence.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Prominence "Prominence") prominence, [![Image 64: Family prestige](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/3/3b/Monthly_character_family_prestige.png/28px-Monthly_character_family_prestige.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Family_prestige "Family prestige") family prestige, [![Image 65: Power base](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/7/73/Power_base.png/28px-Power_base.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Power_base "Power base") power base, and the [![Image 66: Position](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/7/78/Office.png/28px-Office.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/File:Office.png "Position") number of positions that a major family expects to hold.

## Fields[[edit](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/index.php?title=Technology&veaction=edit&section=9 "Edit section: Fields") | [edit source](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/index.php?title=Technology&action=edit&section=9 "Edit section: Fields")]

The modifiers for a single level of advances in each field are listed below. Each level provides an additional modifier on top of the previous ones already accumulated.

### [![Image 67: Martial.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/9/98/Military_power.png/28px-Military_power.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Martial_inventions "Martial inventions") Martial Advances[[edit](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/index.php?title=Technology&veaction=edit&section=10 "Edit section: Martial Advances") | [edit source](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/index.php?title=Technology&action=edit&section=10 "Edit section: Martial Advances")]

### [![Image 68: Finesse.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/5/57/Civic_power.png/28px-Civic_power.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Civic_inventions "Civic inventions") Civic Advances[[edit](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/index.php?title=Technology&veaction=edit&section=11 "Edit section: Civic Advances") | [edit source](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/index.php?title=Technology&action=edit&section=11 "Edit section: Civic Advances")]

### [![Image 69: Charisma.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/8/8d/Oratory_power.png/28px-Oratory_power.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Oratory_inventions "Oratory inventions") Oratory Advances[[edit](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/index.php?title=Technology&veaction=edit&section=12 "Edit section: Oratory Advances") | [edit source](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/index.php?title=Technology&action=edit&section=12 "Edit section: Oratory Advances")]

*   [![Image 70: Civilization.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/c/c6/Civilization.png/28px-Civilization.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Civilization_value "Civilization value")**+0.5%** Country Civilization Value

### [![Image 71: Zeal.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/e/ea/Religious_power.png/28px-Religious_power.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Religious_inventions "Religious inventions") Religious Advances[[edit](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/index.php?title=Technology&veaction=edit&section=13 "Edit section: Religious Advances") | [edit source](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/index.php?title=Technology&action=edit&section=13 "Edit section: Religious Advances")]

*   [![Image 72: Omen.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/a/aa/Omen.png/28px-Omen.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Religion#Omens "Religion")**+1%** Omen Power

## Inventions[[edit](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/index.php?title=Technology&veaction=edit&section=14 "Edit section: Inventions") | [edit source](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/index.php?title=Technology&action=edit&section=14 "Edit section: Inventions")]

_Main article: [Invention](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Invention "Invention")_

[![Image 73: Invention.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/1/13/Invention.png/28px-Invention.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Inventions "Inventions")**Inventions** represent specific technologies or practices that can be adopted by the state in order to get a specific military, economic, or political effects and bonuses. Every invention is associated with a specific field of advances and is structured as part of a tree, with most inventions requiring prerequisites that must be adopted first before the next invention can be taken. Inventions are adopted by spending [![Image 74: Invention.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/1/13/Invention.png/28px-Invention.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Innovation "Innovation")**innovations**, gained primarily from technological advances (which grant one innovation for each level) as well as from a few [![Image 75: Military tradition.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/b/b3/Military_tradition.png/28px-Military_tradition.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Military_traditions "Military traditions") military traditions, [![Image 76: Menu mission.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/b/bb/Menu_mission.png/28px-Menu_mission.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Missions "Missions") mission tasks, and events.

## References[[edit](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/index.php?title=Technology&veaction=edit&section=15 "Edit section: References") | [edit source](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/index.php?title=Technology&action=edit&section=15 "Edit section: References")]


============================================================
# Advance
============================================================
Title: Technology - Imperator Wiki

URL Source: https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Advance

Markdown Content:
This article has been verified for the current [version](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Imperator_Wiki:Versioning "Imperator Wiki:Versioning") (2.0) of the game.

Load video

Imperator: Rome - Characters & Inventions (inventions section starts at **4:36**).

[![Image 1](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/6/6d/Technology_screen.png/700px-Technology_screen.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/File:Technology_screen.png)

The main technology interface

[![Image 2: Menu technology.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/6/6f/Menu_technology.png/28px-Menu_technology.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Technology "Technology")[Technology](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Advance) represents the discovery, improvement, and implementation of new tools, techniques, and customs that give a wide variety of powerful bonuses across every field. Technologically advanced [nations](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/State "State") will field a more effective military, make more efficient use of their pops and resources, and be able to create a more stable and loyal realm, while those that fall behind will find it increasingly difficult to keep up with their peers. All technologies fall into one of four fields - [![Image 3: Martial.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/9/98/Military_power.png/28px-Military_power.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Martial_inventions "Martial inventions") martial, [![Image 4: Finesse.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/5/57/Civic_power.png/28px-Civic_power.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Civic_inventions "Civic inventions") civic, [![Image 5: Charisma.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/8/8d/Oratory_power.png/28px-Oratory_power.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Oratory_inventions "Oratory inventions") oratory and [![Image 6: Zeal.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/e/ea/Religious_power.png/28px-Religious_power.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Religious_inventions "Religious inventions") religious - and can be divided between generic **advances** that gain progress from generation of [![Image 7: Research points.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/c/cb/Research_points.png/28px-Research_points.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Technology "Technology")**research points** by [![Image 8: Pop noble.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/c/c8/Pop_noble.png/28px-Pop_noble.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Noble "Noble") nobles and [![Image 9: Citizens](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/0/06/Pop_citizen.png/28px-Pop_citizen.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Population#Citizens "Citizens") citizens, and the more specific [![Image 10: Invention.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/1/13/Invention.png/28px-Invention.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Inventions "Inventions")**inventions** that can be adopted by spending the [![Image 11: Invention.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/1/13/Invention.png/28px-Invention.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Innovation "Innovation") innovations that advances grant. The main technology interface can be accessed though the [![Image 12: Menu technology.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/6/6f/Menu_technology.png/28px-Menu_technology.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Technology "Technology")**technology** tab in the side menu bar.

## Advances[[edit](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/index.php?title=Technology&veaction=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Advances") | [edit source](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/index.php?title=Technology&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Advances")]

**Advances** represent the general level of knowledge and technology that the country has reached. They provide a baseline level of modifiers from increased technology and each advance grants [![Image 13: Invention.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/1/13/Invention.png/28px-Invention.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Innovation "Innovation") 1 innovation that can be used to unlock an [invention](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Inventions "Inventions"). There is no cap in the maximum level of advances that can be achieved, though ahead-of-time penalties will effectively give a soft cap to the level of advances that is realistically possible to achieve. Advances are slowly researched over time based on the amount of [![Image 14: Research points.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/c/cb/Research_points.png/28px-Research_points.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Technology "Technology") research points that a country produces in proportion to its [![Image 15: Integrated.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/1/14/Integrated.png/28px-Integrated.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Culture#Integrated_cultures "Culture") integrated culture population, subject to many different modifiers that can further increase or decrease the speed at which research progress is accumulated.

### Starting advances level[[edit](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/index.php?title=Technology&veaction=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Starting advances level") | [edit source](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/index.php?title=Technology&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Starting advances level")]

Each country starts with a predetermined level of technological advances, usually determined by their culture and civilization level, along with a number of unused [![Image 16: Invention.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/1/13/Invention.png/28px-Invention.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Innovation "Innovation") innovations corresponding to its starting advances level (if applicable).

The following countries/cultures start with all advances at level **2** (with [![Image 17: Invention.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/1/13/Invention.png/28px-Invention.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Innovation "Innovation")**8** starting innovations):

The following countries/cultures start with all advances at level **1** (with [![Image 18: Invention.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/1/13/Invention.png/28px-Invention.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Innovation "Innovation")**4** starting innovations):

All other countries start with no advances (level **0**) or innovations.

## Research[[edit](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/index.php?title=Technology&veaction=edit&section=3 "Edit section: Research") | [edit source](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/index.php?title=Technology&action=edit&section=3 "Edit section: Research")]

### Research points[[edit](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/index.php?title=Technology&veaction=edit&section=4 "Edit section: Research points") | [edit source](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/index.php?title=Technology&action=edit&section=4 "Edit section: Research points")]

[![Image 19: Research points.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/c/cb/Research_points.png/28px-Research_points.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Technology "Technology")**Research points** represent the contribution of pops towards the technological and intellectual advancement of the country, and are summed up over every pop in every owned territory every month to get the total research points for the state. Research points are generated exclusively by [![Image 20: Pop noble.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/c/c8/Pop_noble.png/28px-Pop_noble.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Noble "Noble") nobles and [![Image 21: Citizens](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/0/06/Pop_citizen.png/28px-Pop_citizen.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Population#Citizens "Citizens") citizens, who produce a base output of **0.5** and **0.2** research points, respectively, each month at [![Image 22: Happiness.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/a/a0/Pop_happy.png/28px-Pop_happy.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Happiness "Happiness") 100% happiness. Therefore, research point production is also affected by [![Image 23: Noble output](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/2/2e/Pop_noble_output.png/28px-Pop_noble_output.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Pop_output "Noble output") noble output and [![Image 24: Citizen output](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/5/5f/Pop_citizen_output.png/28px-Pop_citizen_output.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Pop_output "Citizen output") citizen output as well as [![Image 25: Research points.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/c/cb/Research_points.png/28px-Research_points.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Technology "Technology") research point modifiers, and is also heavily dependent on the [![Image 26: Noble ratio](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/9/9e/Pop_noble_ratio.png/28px-Pop_noble_ratio.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Pop_ratio "Noble ratio")[![Image 27: Citizen ratio](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/4/45/Pop_citizen_ratio.png/28px-Pop_citizen_ratio.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Pop_ratio "Citizen ratio") proportion and [![Image 28: Noble happiness](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/3/34/Pop_noble_happiness.png/28px-Pop_noble_happiness.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Happiness "Noble happiness")[![Image 29: Citizen happiness](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/4/4c/Pop_citizen_happiness.png/28px-Pop_citizen_happiness.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Happiness "Citizen happiness") happiness of nobles and citizens in the country. This means that in addition to directly maximizing research point production (such as by building [![Image 30: Library](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/5/55/Building_library.png/28px-Building_library.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Buildings#Library "Library") libraries and increasing overall [![Image 31: Population output](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/7/78/Local_population_output.png/28px-Local_population_output.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Output_modifier "Population output") population output with [![Image 32: Foundry](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/f/fa/Building_foundry.png/28px-Building_foundry.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Buildings#Foundry "Foundry") foundries and raising [![Image 33: Civilization.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/c/c6/Civilization.png/28px-Civilization.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Civilization_value "Civilization value") civilization level), increasing [![Image 34: Noble ratio](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/9/9e/Pop_noble_ratio.png/28px-Pop_noble_ratio.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Pop_ratio "Noble ratio") noble ratio and [![Image 35: Citizen ratio](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/4/45/Pop_citizen_ratio.png/28px-Pop_citizen_ratio.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Pop_ratio "Citizen ratio") citizen ratio directly through laws and [![Image 36: Academy](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/a/aa/Building_academy.png/28px-Building_academy.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Buildings#Academy "Academy") academies and [![Image 37: Court of Law](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/3/3b/Building_court.png/28px-Building_court.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Buildings#Court_of_Law "Court of Law") courts of law or indirectly by building more and larger [![Image 38: Territory city.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/b/b5/Territory_city.png/28px-Territory_city.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/City "City")[cities](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Cities "Cities") (as nobles and citizens do not exist in appreciable numbers in settlements) are also an effective longer-term solution towards increasing research point production. Large cities and [metropolises](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Metropolis "Metropolis") are usually the largest source of research points in the middle to late game, as the stacking effects of [![Image 39: Academy](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/a/aa/Building_academy.png/28px-Building_academy.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Buildings#Academy "Academy") academies and [![Image 40: Court of Law](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/3/3b/Building_court.png/28px-Building_court.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Buildings#Court_of_Law "Court of Law") courts of law as well as general [![Image 41: Civilization.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/c/c6/Civilization.png/28px-Civilization.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Civilization_value "Civilization value") civilization level increases from buildings means that they usually have both the highest proportion of nobles and citizens and the highest happiness and research point production per noble/citizen, though population capacity means that larger empires will still need a significant number of cities to produce enough research.

The following inventions give percentage increases to the amount of research points produced:

### Monthly research[[edit](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/index.php?title=Technology&veaction=edit&section=5 "Edit section: Monthly research") | [edit source](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/index.php?title=Technology&action=edit&section=5 "Edit section: Monthly research")]

**Monthly research** is the base value of research progress for all four fields and is obtained by dividing research efficiency by **192**, corresponding to a base time of 192 months (16 years) for each advance. The baseline research efficiency cap of 125% initially caps monthly research at **0.65%**, with the maximum possible research efficiency of 250% giving a highest possible base monthly research of **1.30%**.

### Research progress[[edit](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/index.php?title=Technology&veaction=edit&section=6 "Edit section: Research progress") | [edit source](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/index.php?title=Technology&action=edit&section=6 "Edit section: Research progress")]

**Research progress** is the actual monthly progress in each field of advances. The base value is the monthly research, which is then modified by the field-specific **research speed** modifier. The [![Image 42: Technology speed](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/e/ed/Technology_speed.png/28px-Technology_speed.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Technology "Technology speed")**technology speed** modifier affects the research speed in all fields, while the field-specific technology modifiers ([![Image 43: Military tech investment.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/b/b3/Military_tech_investment.png/28px-Military_tech_investment.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Technology#Research_Progress "Technology")**military tech investment**, [![Image 44: Civic tech investment.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/6/68/Civic_tech_investment.png/28px-Civic_tech_investment.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Technology#Research_Progress "Technology")**civic tech investment**, [![Image 45: Oratory tech investment.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/5/5c/Oratory_tech_investment.png/28px-Oratory_tech_investment.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Technology#Research_Progress "Technology")**oratory tech investment**, and [![Image 46: Religious tech investment.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/e/e3/Religious_tech_investment.png/28px-Religious_tech_investment.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Technology#Research_Progress "Technology")**religious tech investment**) are applied only to the research speed of one specific field. Modifiers to research speed can come from various [deity](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Pantheon "Pantheon") bonuses and omens, country [heritages](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Heritages "Heritages"), [trade goods](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Trade_goods "Trade goods"), and event/mission modifiers, but the main component of research speed for each field will typically be the attribute of the field's researcher corresponding to the field. The behind/ahead of time modifier is applied multiplicatively after all the other modifiers, and gives a **-0.75%** malus for each year ahead and **+0.75%** bonus for each year behind the country is compared to the benchmark of 1 advance every **16** years after the start of the game. Certain events can also directly increase the amount of research progress accumulated in a particular field.

An advance will be researched once the total research progress for that field reaches **100%**, with any overflow carried over for the next advance. The progress and effects (including unlocked inventions) of the next advance in each field can be viewed in the tooltip of the corresponding progress bar.

### Research efficiency[[edit](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/index.php?title=Technology&veaction=edit&section=7 "Edit section: Research efficiency") | [edit source](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/index.php?title=Technology&action=edit&section=7 "Edit section: Research efficiency")]

**Research efficiency** is the ratio of research points produced per year to [![Image 47: Integrated.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/1/14/Integrated.png/28px-Integrated.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Culture#Integrated_cultures "Culture") integrated culture population and the main component of the actual research progress each month, meaning that larger countries generally need higher research point generation in order to keep up with research. It is calculated according to the following formula:

![Image 48: {\displaystyle {\text{Research efficiency}}={\frac {{\text{Research Points}}\cdot 12}{\text{Integrated Culture Population}}}\cdot 100\%}](https://en.wikipedia.org/api/rest_v1/media/math/render/svg/2fecfacf5a2b7c96761cc8b4b0ec860ff50bc86b)
Generally, it is desirable to keep research efficiency at at least 80% in order to research advances at a reasonable pace. Research efficiency has a baseline cap of **125%**, modified by the [![Image 49: Research points.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/c/cb/Research_points.png/28px-Research_points.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Technology "Technology")**maximum research efficiency** modifier. Each of the following inventions gives [![Image 50: Research points.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/c/cb/Research_points.png/28px-Research_points.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Technology "Technology")**+25%** maximum research efficiency, giving a maximum of **250%** research efficiency if all of them are adopted:

Even though research efficiency is capped, it can still be useful to try to push the research points to population ratio higher in order to provide a buffer when assimilating pops or integrating new territory. Small, highly urbanized city-states will generally have a much higher research efficiency than sprawling empires with many rural pops, though it is possible to have a high research efficiency even with the largest empires so long as the major cities are sufficiently large and research-focused, of which growth through [enslavement](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Enslavement "Enslavement"), [migration](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Migration "Migration"), and continued [![Image 51: Territory city.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/b/b5/Territory_city.png/28px-Territory_city.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/City "City") urbanization will typically be needed to keep up.

As the denominator of research efficiency is based on the [![Image 52: Integrated.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/1/14/Integrated.png/28px-Integrated.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Culture#Integrated_cultures "Culture") integrated culture population, not the total population, it is also possible to get high research efficiency by keeping a relatively small core of integrated culture pops compared to the empire's total output - especially useful is conquering foreign areas with significant numbers of [![Image 53: Pop noble.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/c/c8/Pop_noble.png/28px-Pop_noble.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Noble "Noble") nobles and [![Image 54: Citizens](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/0/06/Pop_citizen.png/28px-Pop_citizen.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Population#Citizens "Citizens") citizens, as they will produce [![Image 55: Research points.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/c/cb/Research_points.png/28px-Research_points.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Technology "Technology") research points but not count against the denominator for research efficiency. However, the lower happiness of unintegrated culture pops, and particularly those of the higher classes that produce research, generally means that more care has to be taken to ensure their [![Image 56: Happiness.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/a/a0/Pop_happy.png/28px-Pop_happy.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Happiness "Happiness") happiness and keep [![Image 57: Unrest.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/e/e1/Unrest.png/28px-Unrest.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Rebellion#Unrest "Rebellion") unrest under control compared to integrating them.

### Researchers[[edit](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/index.php?title=Technology&veaction=edit&section=8 "Edit section: Researchers") | [edit source](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/index.php?title=Technology&action=edit&section=8 "Edit section: Researchers")]

Each technology field can have one **researcher** assigned to it, who leads the research efforts in that field and has a significant influence on how quickly advances in that field progress, giving a **+10%** research speed boost for each attribute point corresponding to the field ([![Image 58: Martial.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/9/98/Military_power.png/28px-Military_power.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Martial "Martial") martial for military advances, [![Image 59: Finesse.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/5/57/Civic_power.png/28px-Civic_power.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Finesse "Finesse") finesse for civic advances, [![Image 60: Charisma.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/8/8d/Oratory_power.png/28px-Oratory_power.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Charisma "Charisma") charisma for oratory advances, and [![Image 61: Zeal.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/e/ea/Religious_power.png/28px-Religious_power.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Zeal "Zeal") zeal for religious advances). Like all other jobs and offices, holding the researcher position counts towards [![Image 62: Prominence.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/c/cf/Prominence.png/28px-Prominence.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Prominence "Prominence") prominence, [![Image 63: Family prestige](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/3/3b/Monthly_character_family_prestige.png/28px-Monthly_character_family_prestige.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Family_prestige "Family prestige") family prestige, [![Image 64: Power base](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/7/73/Power_base.png/28px-Power_base.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Power_base "Power base") power base, and the [![Image 65: Position](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/7/78/Office.png/28px-Office.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/File:Office.png "Position") number of positions that a major family expects to hold.

## Fields[[edit](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/index.php?title=Technology&veaction=edit&section=9 "Edit section: Fields") | [edit source](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/index.php?title=Technology&action=edit&section=9 "Edit section: Fields")]

The modifiers for a single level of advances in each field are listed below. Each level provides an additional modifier on top of the previous ones already accumulated.

### [![Image 66: Martial.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/9/98/Military_power.png/28px-Military_power.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Martial_inventions "Martial inventions") Martial Advances[[edit](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/index.php?title=Technology&veaction=edit&section=10 "Edit section: Martial Advances") | [edit source](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/index.php?title=Technology&action=edit&section=10 "Edit section: Martial Advances")]

### [![Image 67: Finesse.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/5/57/Civic_power.png/28px-Civic_power.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Civic_inventions "Civic inventions") Civic Advances[[edit](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/index.php?title=Technology&veaction=edit&section=11 "Edit section: Civic Advances") | [edit source](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/index.php?title=Technology&action=edit&section=11 "Edit section: Civic Advances")]

### [![Image 68: Charisma.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/8/8d/Oratory_power.png/28px-Oratory_power.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Oratory_inventions "Oratory inventions") Oratory Advances[[edit](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/index.php?title=Technology&veaction=edit&section=12 "Edit section: Oratory Advances") | [edit source](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/index.php?title=Technology&action=edit&section=12 "Edit section: Oratory Advances")]

*   [![Image 69: Civilization.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/c/c6/Civilization.png/28px-Civilization.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Civilization_value "Civilization value")**+0.5%** Country Civilization Value

### [![Image 70: Zeal.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/e/ea/Religious_power.png/28px-Religious_power.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Religious_inventions "Religious inventions") Religious Advances[[edit](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/index.php?title=Technology&veaction=edit&section=13 "Edit section: Religious Advances") | [edit source](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/index.php?title=Technology&action=edit&section=13 "Edit section: Religious Advances")]

*   [![Image 71: Omen.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/a/aa/Omen.png/28px-Omen.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Religion#Omens "Religion")**+1%** Omen Power

## Inventions[[edit](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/index.php?title=Technology&veaction=edit&section=14 "Edit section: Inventions") | [edit source](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/index.php?title=Technology&action=edit&section=14 "Edit section: Inventions")]

_Main article: [Invention](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Invention "Invention")_

[![Image 72: Invention.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/1/13/Invention.png/28px-Invention.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Inventions "Inventions")**Inventions** represent specific technologies or practices that can be adopted by the state in order to get a specific military, economic, or political effects and bonuses. Every invention is associated with a specific field of advances and is structured as part of a tree, with most inventions requiring prerequisites that must be adopted first before the next invention can be taken. Inventions are adopted by spending [![Image 73: Invention.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/1/13/Invention.png/28px-Invention.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Innovation "Innovation")**innovations**, gained primarily from technological advances (which grant one innovation for each level) as well as from a few [![Image 74: Military tradition.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/b/b3/Military_tradition.png/28px-Military_tradition.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Military_traditions "Military traditions") military traditions, [![Image 75: Menu mission.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/b/bb/Menu_mission.png/28px-Menu_mission.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Missions "Missions") mission tasks, and events.

## References[[edit](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/index.php?title=Technology&veaction=edit&section=15 "Edit section: References") | [edit source](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/index.php?title=Technology&action=edit&section=15 "Edit section: References")]

# Research_points
============================================================
Title: Technology - Imperator Wiki

URL Source: https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Research_points

Markdown Content:
