## Diplomatic actions[[edit](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/index.php?title=Diplomacy&veaction=edit&section=6 "Edit section: Diplomatic actions") | [edit source](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/index.php?title=Diplomacy&action=edit&section=6 "Edit section: Diplomatic actions")]

**Diplomatic actions** are the primary way that two countries interact with each other, allowing a country to negotiate various agreements, make demands, improve relations, and more. Many diplomatic actions have certain restrictions, such as requiring a certain [country rank](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Country_rank "Country rank") or [![Image 118: Opinion improvement active.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/8/8d/Opinion_improvement_active.png/28px-Opinion_improvement_active.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Opinion "Opinion") opinion threshold; most actions also require that the target country be within [![Image 119: Diplomatic range.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/2/23/Diplomatic_range.png/28px-Diplomatic_range.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Diplomatic_range "Diplomatic range") diplomatic range, and cannot be done by or to [![Image 120: Vassalized.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/8/8b/Vassalized.png/28px-Vassalized.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Subject_nations "Subject nations") subject states. After taking an action, the current country will be unable to take any more diplomatic actions against the same country for the next **30** days.

If the [government type](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Government "Government") is a [republic](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Republic "Republic"), the [senate](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Government#The_Senate "Government") will vote on all diplomatic actions. As with all such actions, the Senate must have at least [![Image 121: Faction approval](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/1/14/Senate_approval.png/28px-Senate_approval.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Government#Senate_approval "Faction approval")**30** approval to take most diplomatic actions, and pushing it through will cost scaling [![Image 122: Tyranny](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/1/1b/Tyranny.png/28px-Tyranny.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/State#Tyranny "Tyranny") tyranny unless the country has at least [![Image 123: Faction approval](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/1/14/Senate_approval.png/28px-Senate_approval.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Government#Senate_approval "Faction approval")**51** Senate approval.

### War Actions[[edit](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/index.php?title=Diplomacy&veaction=edit&section=7 "Edit section: War Actions") | [edit source](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/index.php?title=Diplomacy&action=edit&section=7 "Edit section: War Actions")]

_Main article: [Warfare](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Warfare "Warfare")_

#### Declare War[[edit](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/index.php?title=Diplomacy&veaction=edit&section=8 "Edit section: Declare War") | [edit source](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/index.php?title=Diplomacy&action=edit&section=8 "Edit section: Declare War")]

[![Image 124: War.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/a/a7/War.png/28px-War.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Warfare "Warfare") Declares war on another state, hidden if the country is already at war with this faction (even if only as a secondary participant). A [casus belli](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Casus_belli "Casus belli") (CB - Reason for War) and wargoal to be used in this war must be chosen, which will determine the goal of the war to get ticking [warscore](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Warscore "Warscore"). War may be declared without a valid CB but this will incur a large penalty to [![Image 125: Aggressive expansion.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/f/fb/Aggressive_expansion.png/28px-Aggressive_expansion.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Aggressive_expansion "Aggressive expansion") aggressive expansion, [![Image 126: Stability.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/a/ae/Stability.png/28px-Stability.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Stability "Stability") stability, and [![Image 127: Monthly war exhaustion](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/8/8c/War_exhaustion.png/28px-War_exhaustion.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/War_exhaustion "Monthly war exhaustion") war exhaustion. Wars cannot be declared against a country's [![Image 128: Vassalized.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/8/8b/Vassalized.png/28px-Vassalized.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Subject_nations "Subject nations") subjects, or if the country has less than [![Image 129: Stability.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/a/ae/Stability.png/28px-Stability.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Stability "Stability")**20** stability.

#### Sue for Peace[[edit](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/index.php?title=Diplomacy&veaction=edit&section=9 "Edit section: Sue for Peace") | [edit source](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/index.php?title=Diplomacy&action=edit&section=9 "Edit section: Sue for Peace")]

[![Image 130: Truce.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/6/6e/Truce.png/28px-Truce.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Truce "Truce") Open a window to choose a [negotiated](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Warfare#Sue_for_Peace "Warfare") end to wartime hostilities. Only available if at least one of the parties involved is the warleader of their side, and secondary participants cannot sue for peace for the first **36** months of a war unless they are completely occupied. [![Image 131: Vassalized.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/8/8b/Vassalized.png/28px-Vassalized.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Subject_nations "Subject nations") Subjects can never sign a separate peace.

#### Demand Military Access[[edit](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/index.php?title=Diplomacy&veaction=edit&section=10 "Edit section: Demand Military Access") | [edit source](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/index.php?title=Diplomacy&action=edit&section=10 "Edit section: Demand Military Access")]

Sends a demand for another country to allow [![Image 132: Has military access.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/9/94/Has_military_access.png/28px-Has_military_access.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Military_access "Military access") military access through their country. If refused, the current country will immediately declare [![Image 133: War.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/a/a7/War.png/28px-War.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Warfare "Warfare") war with the **Gain Military Access**[wargoal](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Wargoal "Wargoal"). This is a special type of war where no demands can be made except that the victor will always gain [![Image 134: Has military access.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/9/94/Has_military_access.png/28px-Has_military_access.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Military_access "Military access") military access through the losing party's territory for the duration of the [![Image 135: Truce.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/6/6e/Truce.png/28px-Truce.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Truce "Truce") truce.

#### Ransom Prisoner[[edit](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/index.php?title=Diplomacy&veaction=edit&section=11 "Edit section: Ransom Prisoner") | [edit source](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/index.php?title=Diplomacy&action=edit&section=11 "Edit section: Ransom Prisoner")]

Ransoms a character that is imprisoned by the other country. The price required depends on the other country's [![Image 136: Opinion improvement active.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/8/8d/Opinion_improvement_active.png/28px-Opinion_improvement_active.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Opinion "Opinion") opinion of the current country and the imprisoned character's [attributes](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Attributes "Attributes"), with a significant emphasis on [![Image 137: Martial.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/9/98/Military_power.png/28px-Military_power.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Martial "Martial") martial skill. Most commonly used for commanders that have been captured after losing a battle.

### Alliance Actions[[edit](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/index.php?title=Diplomacy&veaction=edit&section=12 "Edit section: Alliance Actions") | [edit source](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/index.php?title=Diplomacy&action=edit&section=12 "Edit section: Alliance Actions")]

_Main article: [Treaties](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Treaties "Treaties")_

#### Offer/Dissolve Alliance[[edit](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/index.php?title=Diplomacy&veaction=edit&section=13 "Edit section: Offer/Dissolve Alliance") | [edit source](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/index.php?title=Diplomacy&action=edit&section=13 "Edit section: Offer/Dissolve Alliance")]

Creates an [![Image 138: Alliance.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/e/e8/Alliance.png/28px-Alliance.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Alliance "Alliance") alliance between two states, where the two countries agree to aid each other in defensive wars and can be called to arms in offensive wars. Allies get [![Image 139: Opinion improvement active.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/8/8d/Opinion_improvement_active.png/28px-Opinion_improvement_active.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Opinion "Opinion")**+50** opinion with each other. Cannot be done if either side is a [![Image 140: Country rank 6.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/6/6e/Country_rank_6.png/28px-Country_rank_6.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Great_power "Great power") great power.

#### Offer Guarantee[[edit](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/index.php?title=Diplomacy&veaction=edit&section=14 "Edit section: Offer Guarantee") | [edit source](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/index.php?title=Diplomacy&action=edit&section=14 "Edit section: Offer Guarantee")]

Creates a [![Image 141: Guaranteeing.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/5/5e/Guaranteeing.png/28px-Guaranteeing.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Guarantee "Guarantee") guarantee of protection from the current country toward another state of lower rank, where the guarantor agrees to aid the other country if is attacked by another power. The country being guaranteed gets [![Image 142: Opinion improvement active.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/8/8d/Opinion_improvement_active.png/28px-Opinion_improvement_active.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Opinion "Opinion")**+10** opinion towards their guarantor, and the guarantor gets [![Image 143: Opinion improvement active.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/8/8d/Opinion_improvement_active.png/28px-Opinion_improvement_active.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Opinion "Opinion")**+5** opinion towards the country being protected. Restricted to [![Image 144: Country rank 4.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/3/3f/Country_rank_4.png/28px-Country_rank_4.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Regional_power "Regional power") Regional powers or above.

#### Invite to/Join/Leave Defensive League[[edit](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/index.php?title=Diplomacy&veaction=edit&section=15 "Edit section: Invite to/Join/Leave Defensive League") | [edit source](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/index.php?title=Diplomacy&action=edit&section=15 "Edit section: Invite to/Join/Leave Defensive League")]

Create a new [![Image 145: Defensive league.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/8/8f/Defensive_league.png/28px-Defensive_league.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Defensive_league "Defensive league") defensive league or join, invite to, or leave an existing one, where all members of the pact agree to aid the others if any of them are attacked. Only the leader of the defensive league can invite other countries to join. Members of a defensive pact get [![Image 146: Opinion improvement active.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/8/8d/Opinion_improvement_active.png/28px-Opinion_improvement_active.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Opinion "Opinion")**+25** opinion towards all members. Restricted to [![Image 147: Country rank 2.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/7/76/Country_rank_2.png/28px-Country_rank_2.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/City_state "City state") City States and [![Image 148: Country rank 3.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/a/ab/Country_rank_3.png/28px-Country_rank_3.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Local_power "Local power") Local Powers.

### Access Actions[[edit](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/index.php?title=Diplomacy&veaction=edit&section=16 "Edit section: Access Actions") | [edit source](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/index.php?title=Diplomacy&action=edit&section=16 "Edit section: Access Actions")]

#### Ask/Cancel Military Access[[edit](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/index.php?title=Diplomacy&veaction=edit&section=17 "Edit section: Ask/Cancel Military Access") | [edit source](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/index.php?title=Diplomacy&action=edit&section=17 "Edit section: Ask/Cancel Military Access")]

Ask another country for [![Image 149: Has military access.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/9/94/Has_military_access.png/28px-Has_military_access.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Military_access "Military access")**military access**, which lets a country freely move its armies through another state's territories and dock its navies in the other state's [![Image 150: Port icon.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/3/36/Port_icon.png/28px-Port_icon.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Port "Port") ports. A country that has military access through another country gets [![Image 151: Opinion improvement active.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/8/8d/Opinion_improvement_active.png/28px-Opinion_improvement_active.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Opinion "Opinion")**+10** opinion of that country. Unlike most actions, asking for or cancelling military access does not require the target country to be within [![Image 152: Diplomatic range.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/2/23/Diplomatic_range.png/28px-Diplomatic_range.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Diplomatic_range "Diplomatic range") diplomatic range.

#### Offer/Revoke Military Access[[edit](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/index.php?title=Diplomacy&veaction=edit&section=18 "Edit section: Offer/Revoke Military Access") | [edit source](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/index.php?title=Diplomacy&action=edit&section=18 "Edit section: Offer/Revoke Military Access")]

Offer [![Image 153: Has military access.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/9/94/Has_military_access.png/28px-Has_military_access.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Military_access "Military access") military access to another country, letting their armies and navies move through the current country's territories. As above, improves relations by [![Image 154: Opinion improvement active.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/8/8d/Opinion_improvement_active.png/28px-Opinion_improvement_active.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Opinion "Opinion")**+10**.

### Influence Actions[[edit](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/index.php?title=Diplomacy&veaction=edit&section=19 "Edit section: Influence Actions") | [edit source](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/index.php?title=Diplomacy&action=edit&section=19 "Edit section: Influence Actions")]

_See also: [Subject nations](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Subject\_nations "Subject nations")_

#### Release Subject[[edit](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/index.php?title=Diplomacy&veaction=edit&section=20 "Edit section: Release Subject") | [edit source](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/index.php?title=Diplomacy&action=edit&section=20 "Edit section: Release Subject")]

Cancel the current country's [![Image 155: Vassalizing.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/3/30/Vassalizing.png/28px-Vassalizing.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Subject_nations "Subject nations") overlord status over this country. This action takes on different names depending on the type of subject, such as **Cancel Tribute** or **Cancel Satrapy Status**.

#### Cancel Subject Status[[edit](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/index.php?title=Diplomacy&veaction=edit&section=21 "Edit section: Cancel Subject Status") | [edit source](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/index.php?title=Diplomacy&action=edit&section=21 "Edit section: Cancel Subject Status")]

Cancel the current country's [![Image 156: Vassalized.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/8/8b/Vassalized.png/28px-Vassalized.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Subject_nations "Subject nations") subject status with the overlord. Can only be done by certain subject types, and gives the formerly overlord a [![Image 157: Casus belli.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/d/d3/Casus_belli.png/28px-Casus_belli.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Casus_belli "Casus belli")**Show Superiority** casus belli for **5** years. This action takes on different names depending on the type of subject, such as **Cancel Tribute** or **Cancel Tribal Vassal Status**.

#### Start/Abort Integration[[edit](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/index.php?title=Diplomacy&veaction=edit&section=22 "Edit section: Start/Abort Integration") | [edit source](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/index.php?title=Diplomacy&action=edit&section=22 "Edit section: Start/Abort Integration")]

Begin the process of [![Image 158: Integrating](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/7/79/Integrate.png/28px-Integrate.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Subject_nations#Integrating_vassals "Integrating") annexing a [![Image 159: Vassalized.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/8/8b/Vassalized.png/28px-Vassalized.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Subject_nations "Subject nations") subject state into an integral part of the country. Can only be used on certain types of subjects (e.g. feudatories, client states, satrapies) and requires that the subject have at least [![Image 160: Opinion improvement active.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/8/8d/Opinion_improvement_active.png/28px-Opinion_improvement_active.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Opinion "Opinion")**+190** opinion of the overlord and that the subject has been under its overlord for at least **10** years, unless it has been under the overlord since the start of the game.

Integration can be aborted at any time, but all progress will be lost.

#### Demand Subject Transfer[[edit](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/index.php?title=Diplomacy&veaction=edit&section=23 "Edit section: Demand Subject Transfer") | [edit source](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/index.php?title=Diplomacy&action=edit&section=23 "Edit section: Demand Subject Transfer")]

Can be used on disloyal [![Image 161: Vassalized.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/8/8b/Vassalized.png/28px-Vassalized.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Subject_nations "Subject nations") subjects of another country to have them peacefully transfer their allegiance to the current country. Requires that the subject has at least [![Image 162: Opinion improvement active.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/8/8d/Opinion_improvement_active.png/28px-Opinion_improvement_active.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Opinion "Opinion")**+80** opinion of the potential new overlord. A Subject is deemed disloyal if their Subject Loyalty drops below **33**.

#### Demand Subject Status[[edit](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/index.php?title=Diplomacy&veaction=edit&section=24 "Edit section: Demand Subject Status") | [edit source](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/index.php?title=Diplomacy&action=edit&section=24 "Edit section: Demand Subject Status")]

Send an offer for the target country to peacefully become a [![Image 163: Vassalized.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/8/8b/Vassalized.png/28px-Vassalized.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Subject_nations "Subject nations") subject of the current country, requiring the other country to have at least [![Image 164: Opinion improvement active.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/8/8d/Opinion_improvement_active.png/28px-Opinion_improvement_active.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Opinion "Opinion")**+100** opinion of the current country. Different actions are available for all subject types that are possible between the potential subject and overlord. Countries are typically hesitant to accept subject status unless the current country is much stronger than the target.

#### Intervene in War[[edit](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/index.php?title=Diplomacy&veaction=edit&section=25 "Edit section: Intervene in War") | [edit source](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/index.php?title=Diplomacy&action=edit&section=25 "Edit section: Intervene in War")]

Joins the side of the target country in one of their [![Image 165: War.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/a/a7/War.png/28px-War.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Warfare "Warfare") wars, requiring that the target country has at least [![Image 166: Opinion improvement active.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/8/8d/Opinion_improvement_active.png/28px-Opinion_improvement_active.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Opinion "Opinion")**100** opinion of the current country and that the current country is at peace. Can only be done by [![Image 167: Country rank 6.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/6/6e/Country_rank_6.png/28px-Country_rank_6.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Great_power "Great power") Great powers or countries that have adopted the [![Image 168: Invention.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/1/13/Invention.png/28px-Invention.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Inventions "Inventions")**Power Diplomacy**[![Image 169: Oratory power.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/8/8d/Oratory_power.png/28px-Oratory_power.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Oratory_inventions "Oratory inventions") Oratory invention.

#### Enforce Peace[[edit](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/index.php?title=Diplomacy&veaction=edit&section=26 "Edit section: Enforce Peace") | [edit source](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/index.php?title=Diplomacy&action=edit&section=26 "Edit section: Enforce Peace")]

Demands that a country make white peace in one of their [![Image 170: War.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/a/a7/War.png/28px-War.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Warfare "Warfare") wars. If they refuse, your country joins the opposing side as a secondary participant. Restricted only to [![Image 171: Country rank 6.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/6/6e/Country_rank_6.png/28px-Country_rank_6.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Great_power "Great power") Great Powers, if they are not already at war. Does not require good relations with any side. No penalties are applied, i.e. you can enforce peace between two foreign nations even if you don't have a casus belli or just signed a truce with the attacker.

#### Threaten War[[edit](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/index.php?title=Diplomacy&veaction=edit&section=27 "Edit section: Threaten War") | [edit source](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/index.php?title=Diplomacy&action=edit&section=27 "Edit section: Threaten War")]

Demands that another country cede a single [territory](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Territory "Territory") that the current country has a [![Image 172: Fabricate claim cost modifier.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/c/cf/Fabricate_claim_cost_modifier.png/28px-Fabricate_claim_cost_modifier.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Claim "Claim") on, starting a [![Image 173: War.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/a/a7/War.png/28px-War.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Warfare "Warfare") war for that territory if they refuse. Restricted to [![Image 174: Country rank 4.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/3/3f/Country_rank_4.png/28px-Country_rank_4.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Regional_power "Regional power") Regional Powers or above. A 5 year truce is applied after doing so.

#### Sell Territory[[edit](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/index.php?title=Diplomacy&veaction=edit&section=28 "Edit section: Sell Territory") | [edit source](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/index.php?title=Diplomacy&action=edit&section=28 "Edit section: Sell Territory")]

Allows a country to sell a single [territory](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Territory "Territory") to another country in return for [![Image 175: Wealth](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/8/8f/Cost.png/28px-Cost.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/File:Cost.png "Wealth") gold. In particular, can be used to grant territories to subject states (i.e. by selling territories for free). There are no restrictions on what territories can be sold - even if they are not adjacent to any of the potential buyer's territory - though the buyer is unlikely to accept unless it is neighbouring or otherwise of interest (e.g. same [![Image 176: Policy cultural assimilation.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/9/96/Policy_cultural_assimilation.png/28px-Policy_cultural_assimilation.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Culture "Culture") dominant culture or has a [![Image 177: Fabricate claim cost modifier.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/c/cf/Fabricate_claim_cost_modifier.png/28px-Fabricate_claim_cost_modifier.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Claim "Claim") claim).

### Covert Actions[[edit](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/index.php?title=Diplomacy&veaction=edit&section=29 "Edit section: Covert Actions") | [edit source](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/index.php?title=Diplomacy&action=edit&section=29 "Edit section: Covert Actions")]

#### Support Rebels/Abort Rebel Support[[edit](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/index.php?title=Diplomacy&veaction=edit&section=30 "Edit section: Support Rebels/Abort Rebel Support") | [edit source](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/index.php?title=Diplomacy&action=edit&section=30 "Edit section: Support Rebels/Abort Rebel Support")]

Supports rebels and stirs discontent in another country, giving [![Image 178: Unintegrated culture group happiness](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/7/78/Happiness_for_wrong_culture_group_modifier.png/28px-Happiness_for_wrong_culture_group_modifier.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Culture#Unintegrated_culture_group "Unintegrated culture group happiness")**-8%** Unintegrated Culture Group Happiness to the target and [![Image 179: Aggressive expansion.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/f/fb/Aggressive_expansion.png/28px-Aggressive_expansion.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Aggressive_expansion "Aggressive expansion")**+0.02** Aggressive Expansion Change and [![Image 180: Diplomatic reputation.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/2/21/Diplomatic_reputation.png/28px-Diplomatic_reputation.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Diplomatic_reputation "Diplomatic reputation")**-5** Diplomatic Reputation to the current country while it lasts. Starting to support rebels also gives [![Image 181: Aggressive expansion.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/f/fb/Aggressive_expansion.png/28px-Aggressive_expansion.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Aggressive_expansion "Aggressive expansion")**+2** aggressive expansion. The target will get a [![Image 182: Casus belli.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/d/d3/Casus_belli.png/28px-Casus_belli.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Casus_belli "Casus belli")**Show Superiority** casus belli against the current country, and the current country will join any [![Image 183: Unrest.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/e/e1/Unrest.png/28px-Unrest.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Rebellion "Rebellion") rebellions that happen against the target. Cannot be used if the current country is [![Image 184: War.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/a/a7/War.png/28px-War.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Warfare "Warfare") at war or has a [![Image 185: Truce.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/6/6e/Truce.png/28px-Truce.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Truce "Truce") truce with the target, and is restricted to [![Image 186: Country rank 5.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/1/19/Country_rank_5.png/28px-Country_rank_5.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Major_power "Major power") Major Powers and above.

#### Fabricate/Cancel Fabricate Claims[[edit](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/index.php?title=Diplomacy&veaction=edit&section=31 "Edit section: Fabricate/Cancel Fabricate Claims") | [edit source](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/index.php?title=Diplomacy&action=edit&section=31 "Edit section: Fabricate/Cancel Fabricate Claims")]

_Main article: [Claim](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Claim "Claim")_

Starts the process of fabricating a [![Image 187: Fabricate claim cost modifier.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/c/cf/Fabricate_claim_cost_modifier.png/28px-Fabricate_claim_cost_modifier.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Claim "Claim") claim on a specific [province](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Province "Province"), which gives a [![Image 188: Casus belli.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/d/d3/Casus_belli.png/28px-Casus_belli.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Casus_belli "Casus belli") casus belli and war goal. Costs a base of [![Image 189: Political influence.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/7/76/Political_influence.png/28px-Political_influence.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Political_influence "Political influence")**20** political power, and can only be done on provinces within [![Image 190: Control range modifier.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/0/0e/Control_range_modifier.png/28px-Control_range_modifier.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Control_range "Control range") control range (i.e. neighbouring the current country or has a nearby coast). Only one claim can be fabricated on a country at a time.

Claim fabrication can be cancelled at any time, but all progress will be lost and the [![Image 191: Political influence.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/7/76/Political_influence.png/28px-Political_influence.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Political_influence "Political influence") political power will not be refunded.

### Relation Actions[[edit](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/index.php?title=Diplomacy&veaction=edit&section=32 "Edit section: Relation Actions") | [edit source](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/index.php?title=Diplomacy&action=edit&section=32 "Edit section: Relation Actions")]

#### Improve Opinion/Cancel Improve Opinion[[edit](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/index.php?title=Diplomacy&veaction=edit&section=33 "Edit section: Improve Opinion/Cancel Improve Opinion") | [edit source](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/index.php?title=Diplomacy&action=edit&section=33 "Edit section: Improve Opinion/Cancel Improve Opinion")]

Start the process of passively improve another state's opinion of the current country, which costs a base of [![Image 192: Treasury.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/7/7e/Treasury.png/28px-Treasury.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Economy "Economy")**25** gold to start, modified by the [![Image 193: Improve relation cost](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/0/03/Improve_relation_cost_modifier.png/28px-Improve_relation_cost_modifier.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Diplomacy#Improve_Opinion.2FCancel_Improve_Opinion "Improve relation cost")**Improve Relation Cost** modifier. Improving relations has a base cap of **+100** towards the country's [![Image 194: Vassalized.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/8/8b/Vassalized.png/28px-Vassalized.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Subject_nations "Subject nations") subjects and **+50** towards all other countries, modified by the [![Image 195: Improve opinion maximum](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/e/ee/Improve_relation.png/28px-Improve_relation.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Diplomacy#Improve_Opinion.2FCancel_Improve_Opinion "Improve opinion maximum")**Improve Opinion Maximum** modifier. Opinion is improved by a base of **1** point each month, also modified by the [![Image 196: Improve opinion maximum](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/e/ee/Improve_relation.png/28px-Improve_relation.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Diplomacy#Improve_Opinion.2FCancel_Improve_Opinion "Improve opinion maximum") Improve Opinion Maximum modifier (so that opinion improves at the same rate for both the country's subjects and all other countries, taking **100** months to reach the cap for the country's subjects and **50** months for all other countries) and decays by **1** each month once the action is no longer active. The opinion improvement process can be cancelled at any time, and will be automatically cancelled once the modifier reaches its cap.

The most important modifiers for a country's improve opinion maximum are listed below:

| Type | Modifier | [![Image 197: Improve opinion maximum](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/e/ee/Improve_relation.png/28px-Improve_relation.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Diplomacy#Improve_Opinion.2FCancel_Improve_Opinion "Improve opinion maximum") Improve Opinion Maximum |

#### Insult[[edit](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/index.php?title=Diplomacy&veaction=edit&section=34 "Edit section: Insult") | [edit source](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/index.php?title=Diplomacy&action=edit&section=34 "Edit section: Insult")]

Insult another state, giving [![Image 218: Opinion improvement active.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/8/8d/Opinion_improvement_active.png/28px-Opinion_improvement_active.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Opinion "Opinion")**-50** opinion with a yearly decay of **1** and gaining [![Image 219: Aggressive expansion.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/f/fb/Aggressive_expansion.png/28px-Aggressive_expansion.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Aggressive_expansion "Aggressive expansion")**1** aggressive expansion. Insults can be stacked to decrease opinion arbitrarily low, and the target country gets a limited duration [![Image 220: Casus belli.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/d/d3/Casus_belli.png/28px-Casus_belli.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Casus_belli "Casus belli")**Show Superiority** Casus Belli.

#### Send Gift[[edit](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/index.php?title=Diplomacy&veaction=edit&section=35 "Edit section: Send Gift") | [edit source](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/index.php?title=Diplomacy&action=edit&section=35 "Edit section: Send Gift")]

Send [![Image 221: Wealth](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/8/8f/Cost.png/28px-Cost.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/File:Cost.png "Wealth")**2.4 times** the target country's monthly income for the target to gain [![Image 222: Opinion improvement active.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/8/8d/Opinion_improvement_active.png/28px-Opinion_improvement_active.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Opinion "Opinion")**+25** opinion of the current country, with a yearly decay of **1**. The maximum total opinion boost from gifts is capped at [![Image 223: Opinion improvement active.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/8/8d/Opinion_improvement_active.png/28px-Opinion_improvement_active.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Opinion "Opinion")**+25**; subsequent gifts will set the value of the modifier back to [![Image 224: Opinion improvement active.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/8/8d/Opinion_improvement_active.png/28px-Opinion_improvement_active.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Opinion "Opinion")**+25**, but cannot be used to stack the opinion bonus higher.


============================================================
# Subject_nations
============================================================
Title: Subject nations - Imperator Wiki

URL Source: https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Subject_nations

Markdown Content:
This article has been verified for the current [version](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Imperator_Wiki:Versioning "Imperator Wiki:Versioning") (2.0) of the game.

[![Image 1: Vassalized.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/8/8b/Vassalized.png/28px-Vassalized.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Subject_nations "Subject nations")[Subject nations](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Subject_nations), or **vassals**, are countries in a subservient relationship to another state, paying tribute or fulfilling commercial or military obligations to their overlord in return for protection from other states. They are restricted in their diplomatic actions, especially with countries other than their overlord, and certain subject types can be integrated directly into their overlord.

## General rules[[edit](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/index.php?title=Subject_nations&veaction=edit&section=1 "Edit section: General rules") | [edit source](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/index.php?title=Subject_nations&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: General rules")]

Each kind of subject state is different, but there are general guidelines all subject states must follow.

## Subject nation types[[edit](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/index.php?title=Subject_nations&veaction=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Subject nation types") | [edit source](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/index.php?title=Subject_nations&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Subject nation types")]

Legend:

*   **Requirements**: These conditions must be true in order to diplomatically request making another country a subject of this type, or enforcing this subject type in a war. Note that this only applies when creating a subject; a pre-existing subject that fails to meet the requirements for its type will not become independent or (in general) convert to another subject type.
*   **Payment**: The subject makes this payment to the overlord on a monthly basis.
*   **Dip. slot**: Whether a subject of this type counts as a diplomatic relation towards the overlord's diplomatic relations limit.
*   **Join wars**: Whether a subject of this type is automatically called into the overlord's wars, if it is loyal.
*   **Integrate**: Whether the overlord can integrate the subject.
*   **Break**: Whether the subject can break the relationship through a diplomatic action (i.e. without a war).
*   **Limit exports**: Whether the subject is limited to only being able to export to its overlord (imports are not affected).
*   **Allow building**: Whether the overlord is permitted to build buildings in the subject's territories
*   **Effects**: Modifiers given to the subject and overlord, if any. If an overlord has multiple subjects of the same (or different) type, the modifiers will stack.

| Subject type | Requirements | [![Image 2: Tribute income.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/e/e9/Tribute_income.png/28px-Tribute_income.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Tribute_income "Tribute income") Tribute | [![Image 3: Diplomatic relations.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/5/58/Diplomatic_relations.png/28px-Diplomatic_relations.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Diplomatic_relations "Diplomatic relations") Dip. slot | [![Image 4: War.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/a/a7/War.png/28px-War.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Warfare "Warfare") Join wars | [![Image 5: Integrating](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/7/79/Integrate.png/28px-Integrate.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Subject_nations#Integrating_vassals "Integrating") Integrate | [![Image 6: Casus belli.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/d/d3/Casus_belli.png/28px-Casus_belli.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Casus_belli "Casus belli") Break | [![Image 7: Export value](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/6/64/Commerce_from_export.png/28px-Commerce_from_export.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Trade "Export value") Limit exports | [![Image 8: Local building slot.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/c/c7/Local_building_slot.png/28px-Local_building_slot.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Building_slot "Building slot") Allow building | Effects |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Tributary | * None | [![Image 9: Wealth](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/8/8f/Cost.png/28px-Cost.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/File:Cost.png "Cost")**15%** of income | [![Image 10: No](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/0/04/No.png/28px-No.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/File:No.png "No") | [![Image 11: No](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/0/04/No.png/28px-No.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/File:No.png "No") | [![Image 12: No](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/0/04/No.png/28px-No.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/File:No.png "No") | [![Image 13: Yes](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/7/77/Yes.png/28px-Yes.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/File:Yes.png "Yes") | [![Image 14: No](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/0/04/No.png/28px-No.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/File:No.png "No") | [![Image 15: No](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/0/04/No.png/28px-No.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/File:No.png "No") | None |
| Feudatory | * Overlord is [![Image 16: Menu government.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/e/e1/Menu_government.png/28px-Menu_government.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Government "Government") not tribal * Overlord has at least [![Image 17: Local.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/9/9c/Local.png/28px-Local.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Territories "Territories")**20** territories * Subject has no more than [![Image 18: Local.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/9/9c/Local.png/28px-Local.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Territories "Territories")**10** territories * Subject and overlord are in the same [![Image 19: Policy cultural assimilation.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/9/96/Policy_cultural_assimilation.png/28px-Policy_cultural_assimilation.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Culture "Culture") culture group | [![Image 20: Manpower.png](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/0/0c/Manpower.png/28px-Manpower.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/Manpower "Manpower")**15%** of monthly manpower gain | [![Image 21: No](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/0/04/No.png/28px-No.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/File:No.png "No") | [![Image 22: Yes](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/images/thumb/7/77/Yes.png/28px-Yes.png)](https://imperator.paradoxwikis.com/File:Yes.png "Yes") | [![Image 23:
